overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART train in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The player sits with a companion character before observing the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape through the window, passing through foggy elevated tracks and dark tunnels, then panning to show other passengers in the train car.

events.description: train begins moving, view shifts toward window showing exterior city lights

agents.ego_description: sitting on train bench next to companion with spiked shoulder pads, holding a device

notable_agents.action: companion with red mohawk, gray beanie, and spiked shoulder armor sitting with arms crossed

character wearing blue shirt with silver spiked shoulder pads and gray beanie
large rectangular window showing dark city exterior with neon reflections
first-person view of hand holding a small device

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit NCART train car. The player sits on a wooden bench next to a distinctive companion character wearing spiked shoulder armor. As the train begins to move, the camera shifts slightly toward the window, revealing the dark cyberpunk cityscape outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train tracks through neon-lit commercial district

events.description: view transitions from interior focus to exterior cityscape through train window
large holographic 'SET SAIL' billboard comes into view alongside track

agents.ego_description: watching the cyberpunk cityscape pass by through the train window, observing neon advertisements

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in glowing cyan and orange holographic advertisements
metal safety railing and support beams of the elevated train track
towering modern buildings with illuminated window patterns
large purple billboard displaying 'SET SAIL' text with muscular figure

segments.scene_description: The camera faces outward through the train window, revealing a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape. The train travels along elevated tracks past towering glass skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. A prominent 'SET SAIL' billboard appears as the train moves through the commercial district, with the metal track railing visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark foggy passage between dense skyscrapers

events.description: environment becomes significantly darker as train enters foggy section between buildings
thick atmospheric fog temporarily obscures distant buildings and lights

agents.ego_description: observing the dark atmospheric passage through the foggy city canyon

entered.detail: tall unlit concrete and metal building exteriors creating a canyon effect
thick greenish atmospheric fog obscuring distant structures and lights
faint glowing lights visible through the fog in the distance
dark metal support beams and infrastructure passing by

segments.scene_description: The train enters a darker, more atmospheric section of the city. Tall unlit buildings create a canyon-like enclosure while thick greenish fog obscures the view ahead. The lighting drops significantly, with only faint distant neon lights visible through the haze, creating a moody, claustrophobic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: train approaching station with bright corporate advertisements

events.description: exiting fog into brighter area with illuminated billboards and station lights
camera begins turning back toward train interior and companion

agents.ego_description: viewing the approaching station area with corporate advertisements and turning back inside

notable_agents.action: companion character visible again as camera turns back from window

entered.detail: bright white advertisement with green circular logo and 'TECHNICA' text
platform infrastructure and station lighting becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the fog into a brighter section approaching a station. A large 'TECHNICA' corporate billboard dominates the left side of the view. As the camera begins to turn back toward the interior, the spiked companion becomes visible again, and station infrastructure appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded NCART train interior with standing and seated passengers

events.description: camera pans to reveal other passengers in the train car including standing man and seated woman
camera continues panning showing train doors, digital route display, and returning to companion

agents.ego_description: panning around the train car to observe other passengers, interior details, and route information

notable_agents.action: bald man in dark coat standing and holding overhead rail
seated passenger with white hair looking at handheld device

entered.detail: yellow vertical support poles for standing passengers
brown leather bench seats with metal frames
various NPCs sitting and standing throughout the train car
teal colored sliding doors with graffiti and wear marks
illuminated route sign showing 'WONDER STREET' and line information

segments.scene_description: The camera pans around the train interior, revealing a moderately crowded car with several passengers. A bald man stands holding a pole while a white-haired passenger sits checking a device. The camera shows teal train doors with graffiti, digital displays indicating 'WONDER STREET,' and yellow support poles before settling back toward the companion character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins inside a dimly lit train car, travels through a contrasting neon cityscape and atmospheric fog, and finally returns to the interior of the carriage. It begins beside a companion in spiked armor before shifting toward the window to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and a prominent SET SAIL billboard. As the train moves deeper into the city, the vibrant lights fade into a claustrophobic canyon of unlit buildings shrouded in thick greenish fog. The scene then opens back into a brighter district dominated by a large TECHNICA corporate billboard before the camera turns away from the window and back toward the interior. Finally, the view pans across the crowded car, passing graffiti-covered teal doors and passengers near digital displays for Wonder Street, before settling once more on the companion character.
